title: Speaking - Part 1
description: Answer the examiner's questions about yourself.

content.task: The examiner will ask you questions about yourself, your interests, and your opinions on various topics.

questions.question: Tell me about yourself and what you do.
What do you enjoy doing in your free time?
How important is it to learn foreign languages nowadays?

script.text: Good morning. My name is Dr. Taylor and I'm going to be your examiner today. Could you tell me your name, please?
Thank you. Now, tell me about yourself and what you do.
And what do you enjoy doing in your free time?
How important is it to learn foreign languages nowadays?
Thank you very much. That's the end of Part 1.
